title: Department Manager Vacancy at Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners:
Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners!
